Star Office UI: The Best Way to Visualize OpenClaw AI Agents

Discover Star Office UI, a viral pixel-art interface that lets you watch your OpenClaw agents work in real-time within a retro virtual office. Learn how to set up this engaging dashboard and optimize your AI workflow with easy-to-follow steps.
